_doc: Minimal Integration Service decision tree (pilot). Deterministic spine: resolve folder/job -> gather job+logs -> branch on DAP error code -> leaf. llm nodes mark where evidence can't decide.

leaf_disabled.cause: Integration Service connection is disabled (GeneralException DAP-GE-3005).
leaf_disabled.fix: Re-enable the connection in the Integration Service UI (or `uip is connections edit <id>`). If it auto-disabled after repeated auth failures, re-authenticate the connection.

leaf_rt_binding.fix: Per the DAP-RT code: supply the empty Connection ID (1002), populate the required field (1003), or fix the trigger match (1052).

llm_disambiguate_3000.reason: DAP-GE-3000 has multiple sub-causes (invalid / no-access / Connections.View / Bad Gateway). LLM reads the '-'-delimited message detail and the connection resource file to pick the child branch.

llm_signature.reason: No deterministic DAP code in the gathered evidence (opaque/wrapper exception, or a signature not in this tree). Hand to the LLM hypothesis loop seeded with the trace.

llm_identity.reason: Could not resolve the folder/job deterministically (ambiguous or empty). LLM resolves identity, possibly asking the user, then re-enters the tree.
